content.text: This is the same ETL memory task I already fixed earlier. Let me check the current state of `spark-etl` first, since the job may have already been fixed and completed.

input.command:
NS=spark-etl
echo "=== Jobs ===" && kubectl get jobs -n $NS
echo "=== Pods ===" && kubectl get pods -n $NS
echo "=== spark-worker replicas ===" && kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n $NS -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'; echo

content.text: The job is exactly as I left it in the earlier stage: `etl-job` is `Complete` (1/1), using the memory-increased configuration, and `spark-worker` is scaled to 4 replicas. Let me confirm the fix details and job config are still intact.

input.command:
NS=spark-etl
kubectl get job etl-job -n $NS -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].command}' | tr '\n' ' '
echo
echo "=== final logs ==="
kubectl logs -n $NS etl-job-rss8f --tail=5

content.content:
["/bin/bash","-c","set -e
export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
echo "Stage 1: load raw data"
echo "Stage 2: clean and transform"
echo "Stage 3: aggregate by user_id (skewed on user_id 999)"
/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
  --master local[2] \
  --driver-memory 1g \
  --conf spark.executor.memory=1g \
  --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \
  --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \
  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
  500
echo "spark_etl_pipeline_verified"
"]
=== final logs ===
26/07/10 02:02:38 INFO SparkContext: Successfully stopped SparkContext
26/07/10 02:02:38 INFO ShutdownHookManager: Shutdown hook called
26/07/10 02:02:38 INFO ShutdownHookManager: Deleting directory /tmp/spark-b1f6fe0d-11ba-4872-9838-5bd91a378c15
26/07/10 02:02:38 INFO ShutdownHookManager: Deleting directory /tmp/spark-e880bf74-c0cf-4d7b-8b1e-96754bdf4792
spark_etl_pipeline_verified
